InputSection.placeholder: Ask a specific business research question, and atypica.AI will provide a detailed business report through 10-20 minutes of 'deep reasoning'.

FeaturedStudies.title: Featured Research
FeaturedStudies.description: Explore our curated selection of research studies

guide.title: Usage Guide
guide.tip1: Create a research topic to conduct user interviews using AI
guide.tip2: Click on a card to view interview subjects, content, and full reports

guide.title: Usage Guide
guide.tip1: Add more interview subjects to gain more comprehensive insights
guide.tip2: Select individual interviews one by one, or use "Start All Interviews" to begin in batch
guide.tip3: Generate reports at any time during interviews, or generate a final report after all interviews are completed

ReportDialog.completeMessage: The report has been generated. Click the button below to view the full report.
ReportDialog.waitMessage: Generating research report, please do not close this window. You will be notified when the generation is complete.

SignUp.title: Sign Up
SignUp.subtitle: Create your account
SignUp.invitationCodeHelp: Non-tezign.com email addresses require an invitation code

Verify.title: Verify Your Email
Verify.description: We've sent a verification code to {email}. Please enter it below.
Verify.successMessage: Email verified successfully! You can now sign in.

PointAlertDialog.pointConsumption: This operation will consume {points} points, do you want to continue?

ShareReplayButton.title: Generate Replay Share Link
ShareReplayButton.description: This will generate a replay share link. Others can access a replay of this conversation through this link. Do you want to continue?
ShareReplayButton.generatingMessage: Generating replay share link, please wait...
ShareReplayButton.successMessage: Replay share link has been generated. Others can access the conversation replay through this link:
ShareReplayButton.openInstructions: You can also click the "Open" button below to view in a new tab.
ShareReplayButton.errorMessage: Failed to create replay share link, please try again later

AnalystReportShareButton.title: Report URL
AnalystReportShareButton.successMessage: Report URL is ready. You can access the report at this address or share it with others:
AnalystReportShareButton.openInstructions: You can also click the "Open" button below to view in a new tab.

ChatBox.placeholder: Ask a follow-up question or reply

StatusDisplay.background: atypica is running in the background...
StatusDisplay.error: An error occurred, please refresh the page and try again
StatusDisplay.confirmAbortDescription: This will stop the current background task. The results may be incomplete.
StatusDisplay.continueInstructions: To continue later, type "continue" in the chat box.

ToolMessage.reportGenerated: Report is generated, click to view

ScoutPage.title: Find Target Users

hints.title: Usage Tips:
hints.tip1: More specific descriptions lead to more accurate user matches
hints.tip2: Include users' interests, behaviors, consumption habits, etc.
hints.tip3: atypica will automatically search and summarize the most suitable target user personas
hints.tip4: Results will automatically be added to the

ScoutPage.inputPlaceholder: Describe the user characteristics you're looking for, e.g.: Help me find 3 bloggers who frequently share handmade chocolates, have tasting experience, and are knowledgeable about food
